/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libvacuum_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libvacuum_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/vacuum_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/vacuum_msgs/msg/detail/trash_item__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/vacuum_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/vacuum_msgs/msg/detail/trash_count__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/vacuum_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/vacuum_msgs/msg/detail/robot_status__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/vacuum_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/vacuum_msgs/msg/detail/game_state__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/vacuum_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/vacuum_msgs/srv/detail/collect_trash__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/vacuum_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/vacuum_msgs/srv/detail/unload_trash__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/vacuum_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/vacuum_msgs/srv/detail/reset_game__functions.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
